{ "name": "convert-source-map", "version": "2.0.0", "description": "Converts a source-map from/to different formats and allows adding/changing properties.", "main": "index.js", "scripts": { "test": "tap test/*.js --color" }, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git://github.com/thlorenz/convert-source-map.git" }, "homepage": "https://github.com/thlorenz/convert-source-map", "devDependencies": { "inline-source-map": "~0.6.2", "tap": "~9.0.0" }, "keywords": [ "convert", "sourcemap", "source", "map", "browser", "debug" ], "author": { "name": "Thorsten Lorenz", "email": "thlorenz@gmx.de", "url": "http://thlorenz.com" }, "license": "MIT", "engine": { "node": ">=4" }, "files": [ "index.js" ] }
